results.title: Phil Regan, Orioles manager when Cal Ripken Jr. broke streak record, dies at 89
results.description: BALTIMORE — Phil Regan, who managed the Orioles for one season in 1995 as part of a baseball career that spanned seven decades, died Wednesday, the team said in a statement. Regan was 89 years old. “We are saddened by...

results.title: Tuesday's preps: Adam's grand slam lifts Pekin into district finals
results.description: PEKIN — Not once, but twice, Keota was one pitch away from dashing the state tournament dreams of the Pekin baseball team on Tuesday. The Panthers kept fighting, even down to their final strike, until one last strike at the plate sent Pekin on to the Class 1A district finals. Henry Adam completed an incredible seventh-inning comeback by hammering a 1-1 pitch from Brennan McGuire over the fence ...

results.title: Orioles rally falls short in 9-7 loss to Cubs
results.description: The Orioles allowed eight consecutive runs and failed to battle back in a 9-7 loss to Chicago.

results.title: Women’s World title match set for AEW Redemption after surprise return
results.description: After making her surprise return on Wednesday’s Beach Break edition of AEW Dynamite, Willow Nightingale now has her shot at the AEW Women’s World title. Nightingale entered Wednesday’s Casino Gauntlet match in the number eight spot, hitting the Babe with the Power Bomb on former foe Julia Hart to get the win. She now faces [...]

results.title: Mark Cuban reportedly takes dispute with Mavericks over control of team to court, cites Luka Dončić trade
results.description: A petition filed by Cuban accuses the Mavericks of reneging on handshake agreements and could complicate the team's arena plans in North Dallas.

results.title: Salaun powers Valkyries past Tempo 83-75 as Golden State wins sixth straight
results.description: Janelle Salaun came off the bench for 26 points as the Golden State Valkyries held off the short-benched Toronto Tempo 83-75 on Wednesday.
